site.description: Competitive Rocket League organization based in Huesca, Spain.

teamHighlight.title: Meet our players
teamHighlight.subtitle: Dedicated professionals representing Crow6 in the competitive arena.

coachingBanner.title: Take your game to the next level
coachingBanner.subtitle: Personalized training to improve your performance in Rocket League in team or individually.
coachingBanner.credibility: 6 years training players with up to 2000+ MMR
coachingBanner.pack_1_description: Ideal for starting to sharpen your mechanics and in-game decisions.
coachingBanner.pack_1_feature_2: Feedback on your latest ranked match
coachingBanner.pack_2_description: The perfect balance between consistent coaching and price.
coachingBanner.pack_3_description: Intensive training for those competing at the highest level.
coachingBanner.pack_3_feature_4: Monthly session with the analyst team

storeHighlight.title: Wear the Crow6 colors
storeHighlight.subtitle: Official gear designed for the team and the fans.

meta.title: Team
meta.description: The official roster of Crow 6 Esports.

open.title: Join
open.desc: We are looking for committed players who want to compete at the highest level. The process is serious — if you are not willing to put in the work, this is not your team.
open.step3_sub: The most important part for us
open.success_desc: We review every application personally. If you are a fit, we will contact you on Discord within 7 days.
open.success_note: If you do not hear back within 7 days, your application was not selected for this round.

closed.label: Process closed
closed.title: Tryouts closed
closed.desc: We are not currently looking for players. Leave your Discord and we will notify you when the next selection process opens.

notFound.title:

FOUND
notFound.desc: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved. Go back and keep competing.
